title: rubus balticus
intro: Rubus balticus, also known as the Canadian black raspberry or wild black raspberry, is a species of shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an astringent and anti-inflammatory, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rubus balticus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties that can help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
